message:
refactor(telemetry): idiomatic Rust cleanups in trace capture

- Add Eq derive to all TraceEvent variant structs (RoutingDecision,
  AdmissionOutcome, GossipEvent, LeaseEvent, SessionEvent,
  PolicyDecision) since they contain no floats and already derive
  PartialEq
- Fix _original parameter name to original in RedactionPolicy::redact_value
  (it is actually used for hashing)
- Replace lossy `as u64` cast with u64::try_from().unwrap_or(u64::MAX)
  in current_time_ms() to handle the theoretical >u64 millisecond case
  correctly
- Replace map().unwrap_or() with map_or() for clarity
- Fix rustfmt: break long .map() chain in CapturedTrace::with_redaction
- Improve doc comments: use backtick formatting for enum variant names
  in struct field docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
